prompt: 우리 앱에 실시간 채팅 시스템 추가해줘. 1:1 채팅이랑 그룹 채팅 둘 다 필요하고, 읽음 표시도 있으면 좋겠어. WebSocket 쓸지 SSE 쓸지는 알아서 결정해줘.

assertions.name: tech-decision-documented
assertions.description: The WebSocket vs SSE decision is explicitly documented in the todo context with reasoning

assertions.name: concern-based-decomposition
assertions.description: Feature is decomposed by concern (data model, real-time infra, API, UI) not artificially size-limited

assertions.name: allows-large-cohesive-todos
assertions.description: Tightly coupled items are kept in the same todo rather than over-split (leveraging handoff)

assertions.name: checklist-items-are-concrete
assertions.description: Each checklist item describes a specific implementable action, not vague directives
